name: CANIMXY3D
description: 3D animated XY scope for 3D trajectory visualization

descriptions: Space-separated color indices for each curve

realParameters.description: X/Y/Z axis limits and window size

integerParameters.description: 25 packed visualization params: displayID, num_curves, num_colors, colors[8], thicknesses[8], style, window flags

controls.description: Event trigger for sampling data points

xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="b1" parent="0:2:0" interfaceFunctionName="CANIMXY3D" blockType="d" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="canimxy3d" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="CANIMXY3D">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="11" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="1 2 3 4 5 6 7 13"/>
    <data line="2" column="0" value="1 1 1 1 1 1 1 1"/>
    <data line="3" column="0" value="-1"/>
    <data line="4" column="0" value="[]"/>
    <data line="5" column="0" value="[]"/>
    <data line="6" column="0" value="-15 15"/>
    <data line="7" column="0" value="-15 15"/>
    <data line="8" column="0" value="-15 15"/>
    <data line="9" column="0" value="50 280"/>
    <data line="10" column="0" value="2"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="300.0" y="200.0" width="40.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: Space-separated values in exprs for multiple colors/thicknesses
25-element integerParams pack: 1 display + 1 count + 1 style + 8 colors + 8 thicknesses + window flags
3 explicit inputs for X, Y, Z coordinates
Complex parameter structure with space-delimited matrices in strings
criticalRules: Event on ControlPort samples new 3D point and adds to trajectory
Supports up to 8 curves with individual styling
